scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,fire,weather,air,routes,report,prediction,glacier -c cyan,red,blue,green,yellow,magenta,white,gray "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-fire" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-weather" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-air" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-routes" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-report" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-prediction" "npm run dev -w packages/agent-glacier"
